title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 8 - 2017: Ancient Rome Backdrop Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle wakes up, comments on his computer overheating and feeling groggy, then excitedly responds to a viewer request for Ancient Rome green screen backdrops after only two videos. He describes the many historical backgrounds he can create — ancient Rome, Boulder Colorado in various years, ghost town mining towns, tribal walled cities — before rambling about video upload struggles with his neighbor's internet and his plan to organize his house so he can find his car papers and sell his car.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enthusiastic and willing to do any background viewers ask for
won't do them — prefers doing things fully or not at all
suspects removing his pyramid is causing him to need more sleep
frustrated and suspects it's not paranoia but a real platform issue affecting him specifically
feels overwhelmed but committed to tackling it today
